question: Give me all the operas of which the composer is also the librettist
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
PREFIX efrbroo: <http://erlangen-crm.org/efrbroo/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?work ?composer WHERE { ?work a efrbroo:F22_Self-Contained_Expression . ?work rdf:type ?operaType . ?operaType rdfs:label "OPERA" . ?work ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?composer . ?work efrbroo:R17_created ?creationEvent . ?creationEvent ecrm:P14_carried_out_by ?composer . }
execution_result: Got no rows and 2 columns in 0.21s
